reasoning_model_1: The model failed the fundamental requirement of Content Accuracy. Instead of reading the requested sentence '这种小把戏对我根本没用。', the model hallucinated a completely different and extended script ('这种小把戏也敢拿来糊弄我？真是笑死人了...'). Although the paralinguistic expression of 'disdain' (scoffing, mocking tone) was present in the hallucinated speech, the generation is completely invalid due to the severe content deviation. According to the scoring standard, if the voice content is clearly inconsistent with the script, the score must be 0.
reasoning_model_2: The model followed the instructions perfectly. Content Accuracy is high, matching the script '这种小把戏，对我根本没用' exactly. Regarding the 'Attitude' (disdain) dimension, the model employs a cold, dismissive tone with appropriate pausing (e.g., between '小把戏' and '对我') and a falling intonation that effectively conveys contempt. The expression is natural and accurately reflects the requested paralinguistic feature without any content errors.
model_comparison: Model 2 is the clear winner. Model 1 failed to adhere to the provided text, generating a hallucinated monologue instead of the specific sentence requested. This constitutes a critical failure in Content Accuracy (Score 0 condition). Model 2 correctly synthesized the requested text with the appropriate disdainful tone, meeting all evaluation criteria.
